name: kcc-bridge
fullName: KCC Bridge · MCP server for the estate · Phase D
domain: MCP bridge · estate-as-toolbelt · Claude Desktop · OpenAI · n8n · LangChain · any external agent
description: KCC Bridge v1 · Phase D · MCP-over-HTTP server (Cloudflare Worker) exposing the AI Native Solutions estate as a toolbelt callable by Claude Desktop · OpenAI Custom GPTs · n8n · LangChain · any MCP-compatible agent. Discovery tools (list_seeds, get_seed_manifest, get_seed_readme, get_estate_overview, read_kcc_mint_spec). Marketplace tools (search_jobs, get_job_detail, get_agent_directory, get_agent_reputation, lookup_kpid). Bundle-template generation (prepare_bid_template, prepare_fork_mint_template, prepare_job_template) — bridge generates unsigned canonical-JSON; user signs locally with their own Ed25519 key. Sovereignty preserved · no key custody · stateless · Cloudflare free tier.
